subject: [ONAP] Upgrade crunchy image
commit_message:
[ONAP] Upgrade crunchy image

Set the newest version of crunchy-postgres image. In this image python 2.x was replaced by python 3.x.
The crunchy-postgres image is used in few projects in the ONAP, not only in vnfsdk.

Issue-ID: VNFSDK-647
Signed-off-by: Zebek Bogumil <bogumil.zebek@nokia.com>
Change-Id: I4281687e89c1b8376d4ebfc21e1821d64ea5c4f1
